feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG standard Field mandatory for change/create request tab
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently facing an issue in the MDG portal.

As in the attached image, the Description field is already by default mandatory. I want to make the "Reason" field mandatory as well. Please guide how to do it.

Currently I am on S/4HANA

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

SAP Master Data Governance 
@chahoud 
@SAPSupport

entry.title: MDG :How to hide custom list UIBB based on company code in customer
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have created a custom list UIBB under 'ERP Customer' tab(Customer governance app).  I want to hide/unhide complete custom list section based on company code. How to achieve it. I tried creating post method for IF_FPM_OVP_CONF_EXIT~OVERRIDE_EVENT_OVP of class CL_BS_BP_OVP_ASSIST, but it is not working.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Mass Maintenance of Sales Area Texts and Email Notes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have to following two questions regarding the mass maintenance of sales Area Texts and Email Notes and i have combined them because they are related to the same tools:

1. My first questions is about the ability to add a new sales text to existing business partners.
My current workflow is the following:
I start by exporting the data for the relevant business partners including the table KNVV_STXL. In a second step i added a new row with the new text and used the action code I (Insert). The issue i faced is, if I try to import the file in the App F6553A i get a warning that "the Action Code I is not permitted for the table KNVV_STXL".

My question is, is there a another action code that can achieve this ? If not, what is an other way to add Sales Texts to business partners in mass ?

2. The second issue is related to the mass maintenance of email notes. In my research i have so far found out, that these notes are saved in the table ADRT and proably in the field AD_REMARK2. But from what i have seen so far, i am not able to export this table within the app Export Master data - business partners (F6551A). Therefore im also not sure if its possible to insert a new entry for this table with the MDG tools.

My question is, is this table and field out of scope for the MDG processes ? If so, is there an alternative way to maintain it in mass ?

Thank you for all responses
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Derivation for Direct Activation Mass Consolidation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a derivation requirement in SAP MDG Mass Processing/Consolidation. The process template we’re using performs direct activation with no Change Request (CR) type involved, so we can’t use the USMD_SSW_RULE BAdI in this scenario. We need an alternative class or BAdI that supports derivations for direct activation.

entry.title: API to Read Change Entity Type in Dynamic BADI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement for Dynamic Agent in the CR update scenario. We need to determine whether the Company Code and/or Sales-level entity data has changed.

  • If only Company Code and/or Sales-level data is changed, the workflow should proceed with auto-approval.
  • If any General-level data changes along with Company Code/Sales, the workflow should route for one-step approval.

Need a logic or API to read change entity type because in read change document we only getting fieldname.

entry.title: how to trigger handler class read method in RAP OData V4 Web API?
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

Good day.

Well, I have a requirement, existing material data coming from third party system to CPI to S/4 HANA MDG and need to create change request and approve it.

So created a RAP service, Table , CDS view , service definition with binding type OData V4 Web API along with behavior definition/implementation In the handler class, defined the methods modify and read. I just want to see if read method is called and data filled. So i would like to know how i can execute/debug the handler class read method.

How can i do the GET call using GW client?

Service URL :  /sap/opu/odata4/sap/xxx_xx_xxx_sb/srvd_a2x/sap/xxxx_xx_xxxx_s/0001/

xxx_xx_xxx_sb -  Service binding         xxxx_xx_xxxx_s  - Service definition

 

 

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: Start mass processing - Products cannot delete from KSSK
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we are facing the issue when we want to mass delete 3 records from KSSK table. 

We are using app Start mass processing - Products ( F1047A ). The whole process seems fine, but the LAST step, the ACTIVATION is giving us error messages.
In the excel template, the tab in which we have our records is called MARA_KSSK, as it is downloaded from Export Master Data - Products (F3251😞


So after the activation process, we have 3 errors: 


First one is there two times: 


Second one only once: 

We were trying to debug it, to find out where the messages come from, but we were not successful.
There are also same errors in SLG1 transaction for workflow user SAP_WFRT:

Do you all have any idea what can be the issue here? Or where to look? 

Thank you very much for any hint and help.

Veronika

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / MDG - How to Mass Import Data into existing Business Partners
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have a few questions about the ability to add new fieldvalues for existing business partners in mass. 
From my research so far the simplified process should work as follows:

1. Export the resprective Business Partners, with the relevant tables and fields (App: F6551A)

2. Add an additional entry (new row) with the needed values into the downloaded Exel-File 

3. Depending on the change, insert an appropiate ACTION CODE in the Action Code column. 

4. Upload the file again and start the consolidation process (App: F6553A and App: F6556A)

My questions are the following:

1. Is this functionality even in scope for the basic/free MDG Version in SAP Public Cloud 2602 ?

2. If i want to add a value for a specific table and field, should i export the complete business partner or just this table/field ? Or is there an other best practice for what tables/fields to use for the export/import ?
So far both ways havent been successfull for me, because i get a variety of errors, including that certain tables need to be included in the upload or that some fields are missing and need to be filled etc.

3. What Action Codes are available in the Public Cloud MDG ? So far i found out that, there is I - Insert; C- Copy and D - Deletion. 
Are there more ?

4. I have encountered multiple tables, where i get an error that the Action Code I is not allowed for this tabel. Does SAP provide information about what Action Code is allowed for what table/field or is this just try and error ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Is there an SAP standard function module or program that notifies us if KEYMAPPING file not created
entry.content:
Hi MDG Experts,

Is there an SAP standard program/fm/class/method that triggers a notification via SOST or Workflow if a keymapping file was not created in SAP MDG?

Let me know guys and hope you can revert soon.

Regards,

newguycloud

entry.title: Erro na Chamada de IDOC para criação de Fornecedor na Argentina no SAP MDG
entry.content:
Estou com um problema de um usuario que precisa criar um fornecedor na Argentina mas a CR usada esta fazendo uma chamada de IDOC.

Este tipo de processo no SAP MDG, deveria criar essa chamda?

entry.title: Not able to derive material Basic Data - Size/dimensions
entry.content:
Dear All

While creating material , not able to derive Basic Data - Size/dimensions first time, but when i enter some random value(ex: 1 or 2) in Size/dimensions, then click enter i can see  Size/Dimensions = length*width*height( as per  USMD_RULE_SERVICE_CROSS_ET )

Size/Dimensions -  0,000 is the BRF value

 

Could someone provide your inputs on this please?

Thank you in advance.

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: Dump MOVE_TO_LIT_NOTALLOWED_NODATA in SAP CRM side
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When the data is sent from ECC to CRM for the business partner...system end up with dump as below in CRM side.

I have just extended the standard structure BUS_EI_EXTERN with some additional fields with STRING format in both ECC and CRM side.

It ends up with generic error and can i know how to fix it.

Observed that in standard code as below runs if the structure holds the STRING format.

I have changed the same to CHAR on the additional fields that i have created. Is there any additional stuff which i need to take care ?

Dump happen in below statement :

Initial loop statement where logic starts:

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP MDG-M: Duplicate Check not working despite correct Match Profile and CR configuration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am a beginner in SAP MDG and I'm currently trying to set up my first Duplicate Matching profile for Material Master (MM) using HANA Search. I want the system to trigger a duplicate warning during the Change Request "Check" or "Submit" step if the Material Description and Material Group match an existing record. However I dont get a popup and even if I press "Check" finds nothing at all.

I set the threshold and the duplication is checked inside the MATL01 Change Request 00 process. Here are some images:

I also read that for generic duplication check using DQM I need data services, but I didnt see anything like that in the turorials Ive watched. When accessing the Connector Administration Cockpit (ESH_COCKPIT), I see the following error: "Current system is a copy of another system" and the search object connector list is completely empty.

My questions:

1. Does the Duplicate Check in MDG require the ESH Search Object Connectors to be active/fixed, even if manual HANA search works?

2. Do I need SAP Data Services (DQM) for this basic HANA-based matching? (help.sap mentions it here: Preparing Data Services to Work With MDG for Generic Duplicate Check | SAP Help Portal, but I’m trying to use native HANA capabilities).

Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to setup Duplicate Checks on MDG Cloud Edition 2602?
entry.content:
Hi, I'm fairly new to MDG Cloud Edition and I can't find enough information online. Everything I find is either about on premise, private cloud or public cloud. The Cloud Edition page from sap is very high level, it doesn't go enough into details to be helpful.

Could someone explain the step by step to setup or configure Duplicate checks for Business Partners?
What are the possibilities there?

entry.title: Industry standard data model for maintaining Vendor Hierarchy, Global Ultimate Parent in MDG
entry.content: Please suggest Industry standard data model for maintaining Vendor Hierarchy, Global Ultimate Parent in MDG and its consumption model for Reporting

entry.title: How to implement method needs_confirmation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need a pop-up confirmation to appear when clicking the “Save” button in MDG-MM CRs.

I followed this blog post : Simple FPM message / confirmation box | SAP Blogs

That seemed promising to me.

I have a Z-feeder class that inherits from CL_MDG_BS_MAT_FEEDER_FORM_MAT, where the IF_FPM_GUIBB_FORM_EXT interface is already implemented.
The NEEDS_CONFIRMATION method is also available, but I can never redefine it because the interface is set to final.

Is there a way to integrate the method, or is there a better way to implement the requirement?

Thanks

entry.title: MDG Front-End to auto populate material master fields
entry.content:
Our customer (RTX) has a custom solution that allows them to:

- Receive a material from a PLM system, and auto create multiple materials in ECC with the same number, by adding suffixes to the number

- Auto populate fields in the material master for eg. if plant = 20, then MRP Controller is 200 

I know Pepsi developed a Flexible Framework that did this, have we done this for any other customers?

 

Thx

Arthur

entry.title: CR Not Visible in NWBC After Creation
entry.content:
SAP Master Data Governance #MDG I have configured a new Change Request (CR) type using the“Create Change Request Type” option under Process Modelling in MDGIMG. However, after completing the configuration, the newly created CR type is not visible in NWBC.

Although multiple CR types are available for the Material domain in the system, the others and newly configured CR type is not appearing.

was any one have help me, in identifying the missing configuration or steps required to make the CR type visible in NWBC.

entry.title: How to Map Vendor with Contact Person When data flow through Interface in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have requirement that we will be receiving Vendor & Contact Person data via Inbound Interface in MDG system.
 The process involves creating the contact person first, then creating the vendor, and finally establishing the relationship between the contact person and the vendor through the change request process.
Data is replicating through SOA in MDG system and for Creation of CR we are using BADI BP REPLRQ IN.
We need logic how to handle creation of contact person & Vendor also link them while creating auto CR.

entry.title: Issue in enabling custom attributes in UIBB for AD_POSTAL
entry.content:
Hello,

We could able to add custom attribute in Data model BP under AD_POSTAL entity. But newly added custom field not coming under GENIL Model. Because of this missing config we're unable to add field in BP_ADDRESS UI Component Configuration.

Please let us know how to add custom fields in BP_Address GENIL model.

 

Thanks

Raji
